properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9 v10 v11

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: When my heart is broken When my life is empty I can't see your face I can't hear your voice When I'm feeling helpless Wandering in the darkness Surrounded by fear and defeat I have a choice to make No matter what comes my way

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I choose to worship I choose to praise I choose to lift up the Name above all names I choose surrender, choose to believe For all that you've done and for all You will be I choose to worship

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Even in the fire Even in the valley I can have joy (thank you Lord) And I can have peace You are always with me You never will forsake me Your Presence is all that I need And I have a choice to make With all that I am I obey

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I choose to worship I choose to praise I choose to lift up the Name above all names I choose surrender, choose to believe For all that you've done and for all You will be I choose to worship

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Though we are pressed on every side May this our weapon and we'll win this fight We made our choice we lift our voice When the church bride rise up and say

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: We choose to worship We choose to praise We choose to lift up the Name above all names We choose surrender, choose to believe For all that you've done and for all You will be We choose to worship

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Even in the fire Even in the valley I can have joy And I can have peace You are always with me You never will forsake me Your Presence is all that I ever need And I have a choice to make With all that I am I obey

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: We choose to worship We choose to praise We choose to lift up the Name above all names We choose surrender, choose to believe For all that you've done and for all You will be We choose to worship

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Though we are pressed on every side May this our weapon and we'll win this fight We made our choice we lift our voice When the church bride rise up and say

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: We choose to worship We choose to praise We choose to lift up the Name above all names We choose surrender, choose to believe For all that you've done and for all You will be We choose to worship
